summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical is selected because the job is an inventory shard, instant close and low-signal closeout are disabled, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, and each open PR remains open for maintainer review. The only security-sensitive hydrated ref is routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Route only #80040 to central OpenClaw security handling; do not comment, close, label, merge, or open a fix for this item from Clownfish.
Already closed context issue; no action needed.
Focused non-security PR with contributor work and maintainer-review/CI blockers; keep open as independent inventory item.
Maintainer-owned focused PR with technical retarget/rebase judgment; keep open.
Draft maintainer feature/config/docs PR with active maintainer signal; keep open for maintainer review.
Draft contributor PR with proof and compatibility review blockers; keep open.
Useful non-security contributor PR related to a quarantined issue but not itself security-sensitive; keep open for maintainer review.
